title: 4x4 Race Cars Crash and Flip Feature Childrens Toy Cars Durable Friction Powered All Terrain Small Handheld Size Indoor Outdoor Play Colourful Assortment 2 Pack
features: ACTION-PACKED CRASH & FLIP FUN – Ignite playtime excitement with 4x4 Race Cars built for thrilling crash and flip adventures. Kids love watching these colourful toy cars tumble and flip with every collision for endless energy-filled entertainment.

FRICTION POWERED FOR ADVENTURE – No batteries needed! Each car harnesses friction power for smooth self-propelled speeds across flooring or garden paths. Children simply push and go, enjoying the satisfying rumble of all-terrain wheels built for action.

ALL-TERRAIN DESIGN & DURABILITY – Rugged rubber wheels and strong plastic construction make these 4x4 toy race cars tough enough for indoor and outdoor play. They tackle uneven surfaces, carpets, or gravel, inspiring imaginative challenges and races.

BRIGHT COLOURS & CHILD-FRIENDLY SIZE – Featuring an exciting mix of blue, orange, green, red, and yellow, these toy cars are made for little hands. The small handheld size ensures easy gripping, safe solo play, and sharing in group games for children aged 3+.

PERFECT GIFT PACK & ELECTOYS RELIABILITY – Each purchase includes a 2 pack of crash and flip 4x4 race cars from Electoys, making it an ideal birthday treat or party favour. Designed to support active play and development for children aged 3 years and above.
description: Product description Bring high-energy racing fun right into your home with these 4x4 race cars, designed to crash and flip for non-stop thrills! Bursting with bright colours and rugged details, these small handheld cars capture children’s imaginations from the moment they grip the controls. Each car is driven by simple friction power—just a quick push sends them careering across floors, carpets, or even outdoors on tarmac and gravel. With every tumble and dramatic flip, kids will giggle and learn, exploring concepts of speed and action while supporting their motor skills and coordination. Built to take on rough and tumble play, their sturdy plastic bodies and robust rubber wheels make these 4x4 race cars ready for any terrain. Blue with orange, green with black, plus other lively colour combos, ensure every play session is as visually exciting as it is fun. Sized perfectly for children aged 3+, little hands will find them easy to hold, race, and crash again and again. Whether indoors during rainy afternoons or outside on sunny weekends, these all-terrain racers encourage active play and endless storytelling. Each pack includes two cars, great for sharing or head-to-head races with friends or siblings. Manufactured by Electoys, this 2 pack is crafted to inspire creativity, competitive fun, and lively group play, making it a brilliant birthday or everyday surprise. Spark your child's sense of adventure while helping them develop their social and physical skills—the race is on with these engaging, durable, and joyful toy cars! Safety Warning Keep away from fire
